CryptoCalk
All Tools

What's New

Latest updates, new calculators, and improvements to CryptoCalk.

April 19, 2026

6 More Calculators — Now 93 Tools Total

Six new specialized calculators have been added:

  • Crypto Retirement / FIRE Calculator — plan your path to financial independence
  • Bitcoin Rainbow Chart Calculator — logarithmic regression with 9 price bands
  • Bitcoin ETF Fee Calculator — compare IBIT, FBTC, GBTC, ARKB expense ratios
  • Token Burn Rate Calculator — analyze deflationary token economics
  • Futures Basis Calculator — spot-vs-futures spread and carry yield
  • DeFi Insurance Calculator — is the insurance premium worth it?

All calculators are available in English, Spanish, Portuguese, Turkish, Hindi, and Russian.

April 18, 2026

18 New Calculators

We've added 18 brand-new calculators, bringing the total to 93 free tools across 1,175+ pages in 6 languages. New additions include:

  • Crypto Arbitrage Calculator — find price differences across exchanges
  • Stock-to-Flow Calculator — model Bitcoin's scarcity valuation
  • Crypto Options Calculator — price calls and puts with Black-Scholes
  • Tax-Loss Harvesting Calculator — optimize your tax strategy
  • Restaking Calculator — estimate EigenLayer restaking yields
  • Liquid Staking Calculator — compare Lido, Rocket Pool, Coinbase
  • Perpetual Futures Calculator — full P&L with funding costs
  • Mining Payback Period Calculator — find your break-even date
  • Dollar Value Averaging Calculator — target-value DCA strategy
  • Bitcoin Energy Calculator — estimate mining power consumption
  • On-Chain Metrics Calculator — NVT, MVRV, and more
  • Grid Trading Bot Calculator — simulate grid trading profits
  • Crypto Inheritance Tax Calculator — estate planning for digital assets
  • Validator Node Calculator — full validator economics
  • Token Valuation Calculator — DCF and comparable analysis
  • If I Had Bought… Calculator — see what your past investment would be worth
  • Crypto Millionaire Calculator — how much crypto to reach $1M
  • Pizza Day Calculator — the legendary 10,000 BTC pizza in today's value

All calculators are available in English, Spanish, Portuguese, Turkish, Hindi, and Russian.

April 4, 2026

Android App Available on Google Play

CryptoCalk is now available as a free Android app. Get instant access to all 93 calculators with offline support — no internet required after the first load.

Download on Google Play →

April 4, 2026

Live Market Data Integration

Several calculators now fetch real-time data automatically:

  • Gas Fee Calculator — live Ethereum gas prices from Etherscan
  • Mining Calculator — live Bitcoin difficulty from blockchain.info
  • Multiple calculators — live BTC and ETH prices from CoinGecko

All live data is optional — calculators work perfectly with manual input if API requests fail.

March 27, 2026

Full Localization — 6 Languages, 1,175+ Pages

Every calculator, button, result text, and FAQ is now fully translated into:

  • 🇬🇧 English
  • 🇪🇸 Spanish (Español)
  • 🇧🇷 Portuguese (Português)
  • 🇹🇷 Turkish (Türkçe)
  • 🇮🇳 Hindi (हिन्दी)
  • 🇷🇺 Russian (Русский)
March 22, 2026

Mobile Experience Improvements

We've optimized every calculator for phones and tablets:

  • All calculators now fit perfectly on any screen size
  • Bigger buttons and inputs — easier to tap on touch screens
  • Tables scroll smoothly on small screens
  • Improved text readability everywhere
March 18, 2026

Launch — 69 Free Crypto Calculators

CryptoCalk launched with 69 free cryptocurrency calculators covering profit & loss, mining, DeFi, staking, trading tools, tax estimation, and more. All calculators run entirely in your browser — no data is sent to any server.

CryptoCalk

Free cryptocurrency calculators for everyone.
